---
title: "class of 26"
description: |
  forward to sommersemester 2026 class documentations and most recent essais
date: "2026-05-08"
categories:
  - quarto
  - linguistics
  - AVL
  - language
image: featured.png
image-alt: "screenshot summersemester 26 projects page"
number-sections: false
include-in-header:
  - text: |
     <style>
     .fadenlogo {
        display: inline-block;
        aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;
        height: 1em;
        margin-bottom: -0.15em;
        mask-image: url('../../assets/images/fadenlogo-fwb.svg');
        mask-size: contain;
        mask-repeat: no-repeat;
        mask-position: center;
        background-color: currentColor;
        vertical-align: baseline;
      }
      </style>
fadenlogo: '[]{.fadenlogo title="rotefaden Logo" aria-label="rotefaden Logo"}'
---

![](featured.png){
  .img-featured
  .img-fluid
  fig-align="center"
  fig-alt='{{< meta image-alt >}}'
  width="600px"
}

**{{< meta fadenlogo >}} FWB** redirect...

:::: {.highlight}

**{{< meta fadenlogo >}} FWB** > go now to __*[SS26 class docs](https://esteeschwarz.github.io/SPUND-LX/pages/004/about.html)*__. 

there you'll find an overview of summersemester 2026 papers, essais, projects and linked documentation related. this is all in-progress and documenting recent research and studies.
:::

::: {.callout-note}
you will be redirected...
:::
